nodes.label: AI as writing quality enhancer
nodes.grounding_span: help elevate my writing quality and ensure that I am conveying the proper message

nodes.label: AI as meeting note taker
nodes.label_negative: Human note taking with potential omissions
nodes.grounding_span: AI takes the meeting notes, that is the most satisfying to me, because nothing is lost

nodes.label: AI as task automator for efficiency
nodes.grounding_span: automate some of those more repetitive tasks or emails

nodes.label: AI as quick answer provider
nodes.label_negative: AI as overly inquisitive requiring clarification
nodes.grounding_span: I get frustrated when AI asks too many clarifying questions rather than just providing a quick answer

nodes.label: AI as enabler of human relationship focus
nodes.label_negative: AI as distraction from human connections
nodes.grounding_span: focus more on developing relationships with my teammates

nodes.label: Time efficiency
nodes.grounding_span: free up time in my day

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI meeting notes
nodes.grounding_span: AI takes the meeting notes, that is the most satisfying to me

nodes.label: Frustration with AI asking too many questions

nodes.label: Optimism about AI automation for efficiency
nodes.grounding_span: very excited to see how it can help us automate tasks

nodes.label: Iterative refinement with human oversight
nodes.grounding_span: I describe what I want the email to say and with which tone. I then let AI craft the email and I will make any corrections

nodes.label: Task-specific autonomy delegation
nodes.grounding_span: For meeting notes, I will let AI handle all of it and I will just proofread
